evidence.claim: Built NLP pipelines for sentiment analysis and document classification
evidence.source_text: Built NLP pipelines for sentiment analysis and document classification — primarily for an internal feedback-analytics dashboard.

evidence.claim: Transitioned from sklearn-based bag-of-words models to DistilBERT for classification
evidence.source_text: Started with sklearn-based bag-of-words models, then moved to transformer-based classifiers (DistilBERT) for the harder classes.

evidence.claim: Developed churn, conversion, and lifetime value predictive models for e-commerce
evidence.source_text: Worked on customer-facing predictive modeling for an e-commerce platform — churn prediction, conversion likelihood, lifetime value estimation.

evidence.claim: Built gradient-boosted tree models using ~80 hand-engineered features
evidence.source_text: main models were gradient-boosted trees with ~80 hand-engineered features.

evidence.claim: Churn model deployed and used by the retention team
evidence.source_text: The churn model is now used by the retention team
Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer (Google Cloud, 2021)

evidence.claim: Transparent about current skill gaps in engineering and infra
evidence.source_text: I'm strongest at the modeling and analysis side; comfortable with Python, scikit-learn, pandas, and standard MLOps tooling, but I'm still building depth on the engineering and infra side of production ML.

evidence.claim: Demonstrated proficiency in a wide range of ML tools and frameworks
evidence.source_text: Skills: Learning to Rank, LangChain, CNN, Microservices, TensorFlow, BentoML, Time Series, MLflow, Reinforcement Learning, Computer Vision, Information Retrieval, Data Science, Recommendation Systems, Haystack, scikit-learn, REST APIs, OpenCV
